version_description: English version of the song - alternate title Forgiveness.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[INTRO]
[ch]Fm[/ch] [ch]Db[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch]

[VERSE]
[tab]                 [ch]Fm[/ch]
I know you moved on[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                                 [ch]Db[/ch]
I heard you're doin' better without me[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Ab[/ch]
Girl this is drivin' me crazy[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]Eb[/ch]
Can't you see what you're doin' on me[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Fm[/ch]
She let go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                                   [ch]Db[/ch]
She killed me when she said it was over[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]                           [ch]Ab[/ch]
Now I'm in the middle of nowhere[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                     [ch]Eb[/ch]
And got no space to breath[/tab]

[PRE-CHORUS]
[tab]                [ch]Fm[/ch]
I'm missing you baby[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Db[/ch]
Up all night goin' crazy[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Ab[/ch]
Now my angel can't save me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Eb[/ch]
Oh no!!![/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Fm[/ch]
I'm missing you baby[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Db[/ch]
Up all night goin' crazy[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Ab[/ch]
Drinking my pain away-ehh-hey[/tab]

[CHORUS]
[tab]                  [ch]Fm[/ch]
Girl I'm not with you, you're not with me[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Db[/ch]
And I don't like the way it feels[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Ab[/ch]
Esto no me gusta[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Eb[/ch]
Esto no me gusta[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Fm[/ch]
Girl I'm not with you, you're not with me[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Db[/ch]
And I don't like the way this feels[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Ab[/ch]
Esto no me gusta[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Eb[/ch]
Esto no me gusta[/tab]

[VERSE]
[tab]                [ch]Fm[/ch]
Can't take the pain, can't take the hurt[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Db[/ch]                                        [ch]Ab[/ch]
I wish that I could turn back in time and say 'I Love You'[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                         [ch]Eb[/ch]
I'd do anything to make it work[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Fm[/ch]                                [ch]Db[/ch]
'Cause even through the times they try to hate on us[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]                                         [ch]Ab[/ch]
The only thing that mattered to me was our love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                                  [ch]Eb[/ch]
I never wanna stop and I never get enough[/tab]

[PRE-CHORUS]
[tab]                [ch]Fm[/ch]
I'm missing you baby[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Db[/ch]
Up all night goin' crazy[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Ab[/ch]
Now my angel can't save me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Eb[/ch]
Oh no!!![/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Fm[/ch]
I'm missing you baby[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Db[/ch]
Up all night goin' crazy[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Ab[/ch]
Drinking my pain away-ehh-hey[/tab]

[CHORUS]
[tab]                  [ch]Fm[/ch]
Girl I'm not with you, you're not with me[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Db[/ch]
And I don't like the way it feels[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Ab[/ch]
Esto no me gusta[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Eb[/ch]
Esto no me gusta[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Fm[/ch]
Girl I'm not with you, you're not with me[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Db[/ch]
And I don't like the way this feels[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Ab[/ch]
Esto no me gusta[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Eb[/ch]
Esto no me gusta[/tab]

[BRIDGE]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                                [ch]Db[/ch]
I know they say that you're moving on[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]                               [ch]Ab[/ch]
But I'm begging you please don't go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                      [ch]Eb[/ch]
No I don't wanna let you go![/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]
Oh no![/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                             [ch]Db[/ch]
Yeah you know that I want you back[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]                     [ch]Ab[/ch]
Baby I love you to the max[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                           [ch]Eb[/ch]
From here to the moon and back![/tab]

[CHORUS]
[tab]                  [ch]Fm[/ch]
Girl I'm not with you, you're not with me[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Db[/ch]
And I don't like the way it feels[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Ab[/ch]
Esto no me gusta[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Eb[/ch]
Esto no me gusta[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Fm[/ch]
Girl I'm not with you, you're not with me[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Db[/ch]
And I don't like the way this feels[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Ab[/ch]
Esto no me gusta[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Eb[/ch]
Esto no me gusta[/tab]

[OUTRO]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]
Dicen que uno no sabe lo que tiene[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Db[/ch]
Hasta que lo pierde pero...[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]
(Yo sin ti)[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Ab[/ch]
Vale la pena luchar por lo que uno quiere[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Ab[/ch]
(No puedo vivir así­)[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Eb[/ch]
Y hacer el intento[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]
(No quiero vivir así­)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]
N.I.C.K[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]
Nicky Nicky Nick Jam[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]
(No quiero que me dejes por favor)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]
Saga White Black[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Fm[/ch]
(Y te pido perdón)[/tab]
